title: When Sub-Item created, Then Create Item in another Board and Link them
excerpt:
When Creating a “Sub-Item” on Board A 
Then Create an “Item” on Board B 
Link them in Both Boards (A&B), under a Linked Column. 
However the link gets created on the column of the mother “Item” of Board A, and not its “S…

posts.author: Steven777 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
When Creating a “Sub-Item” on Board A
Then Create an “Item” on Board B
Link them in Both Boards (A&B), under a Linked Column.

However the link gets created on the column of the mother “Item” of Board A, and not its “Sub-Item”. Which defeats the purpose of linking SubItem and Item of the different boards.

Need help with this ASAP.
Please push the Vote button.

Screenshot 2024-11-15 1411411111×392 16.4 KB

Screenshot 2024-11-15 161349729×207 15.6 KB

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Steven777,

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of how it can be applied in this case →

Screenshot 2024-11-23 at 11.22.002128×588 36.7 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/10000287

Hope that helps!

posts.author: Kori.Hare (Kori Hare)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a useful feature, but I would also like the ability to select the prefill columns, like you are able to do with the basic monday.com function of creating an item from a subitem.

Is this possible with your app as well?
